title: MagSafe Monday: Upgrade your MagSafe travel gear with the new ESR summer collection
summary: I grew up in a time when we outfitted our Nokia phones with awesome faceplates. My local flea market was a great place to get them. MagSafe and iPhone cases are about as close as we will get to that today. ESR is launching its new summer series of iPhone 17 cases and MagSafe accessories.

title: الشركة الأم "يام" براندز تبيع بيتزا هت مقابل 2.7 مليار دولار
summary: من المقرر أن تبيع الشركة الأم "يام" براندز مطعم بيتزا هت المتعثر مقابل 2.7 مليار دولار.
